goal: Work the weighted .evolve/inbox backlog top-down: for each cycle, implement the fleet-assigned inbox item (triage top_n is the sole task authority; scout scopes discovery to that item, never proposes alternative tasks). Highest-weight items first: builder-task-binding-topn-gate, retro-preventive-actions-autofile-inbox, infra-classifier-echo-veto, statefile-rmw-flock-single-source (re-scoped: leaf package internal/adapters/statemap). Preserve every phase-integrity guarantee and gate behavior.

phases.name: cycle-recorded
